children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is established within the Institute an office to be known as the Office of Rural Mental Health Research (hereafter in this section referred to as the “Office”). The Office shall be headed by a director, who shall be appointed by the Director of such Institute from among individuals experienced or knowledgeable in the provision of mental health services in rural areas. The Secretary shall carry out the authorities established in this section acting through the Director of the Office.
coordinate the research activities of the Department of Health and Human Services as such activities relate to the mental health of residents of rural areas; and
coordinate the activities of the Office with similar activities of public and nonprofit private entities.

children.heading: Research, demonstrations, evaluations, and dissemination
children.label: c Research, demonstrations, evaluations, and dissemination

children.text: conduct research on conditions that are unique to the residents of rural areas, or more serious or prevalent in such residents;
conduct research on improving the delivery of services in such areas; and
disseminate information to appropriate public and nonprofit private entities.

children.heading: Authority regarding grants and contracts
children.label: d Authority regarding grants and contracts
children.text: The Director of the Office may carry out the authorities established in subsection (c) directly and through grants, cooperative agreements, or contracts with public or nonprofit private entities.
